title: Is there a way to identify updates sent via email?
excerpt: When viewing updates on the item card view, there is indicator showing when an update was sent via Email. Is there a way to identify these updates using the API?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
When viewing updates on the item card view, there is indicator showing when an update was sent via Email. Is there a way to identify these updates using the API?

image731×161 15.5 KB

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @JCorrell

That’s an awesome question! I’m afraid that at the time, this is not possible to identify via the API just yet, but I definitely see how this could be a useful feature to have at your disposal. I’ve gone ahad and passed this as a suggestion to our product team, and we’ll consider it as we plan future iterations

I hope that helps - thanks for raising the topic!

-Alex
